case_title: HOLLAND, HENRY C. DBA RAINBOW BAY AREA ENTERPRISES VS SUMITOMO CONSTRUCTION AMERICA, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HOLLAND, HENRY C. DBA RAINBOW BAY AREA ENTERPRISES AS TO DEFENDANT SUMITOMO CONSTRUCTION AMERICA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
